feedback.text: I would like to request you include Video Game destruction and End of Life plans for the digital goods of video games to the scope of the initiative. Consumers nowadays don't get any protection for the purchases / "licensing" of video games and their right of access to the product they paid for can be revoked at any time without any proper compensation. You can look into the 2024 example of the French company Ubisoft shutting down the servers for their game "The Crew" and rendering a game with over 12 million copies sold unplayable forever. The Stop Destroying Videogames European Citizens initiative is aiming at addressing this, but it will never hurt to provide more consumer protections for video games with other initiatives. Thank you.
